html:
Exclusive to:

Jellybeans are a Crock Pot Food item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. They are produced by combining at least 1 Royal Jelly and 3 fillers, excluding Inedibles and Monster Foods (which will result in Taffy), and produce 3 Jellybeans.

Eating Jellybeans gives the character 2 and 5 upon consumption and then starts the regenerating effect of 2 every 2 seconds for 2 minutes, for a total of 122 Health. Eating multiple Jellybeans will not stack the healing effects.

Wigfrid is capable of eating Jellybeans, despite it not being meat.

Recipe

×3

×3

Filler cannot be Inedibles or Monster Food.

Examples

×3

×3

×3

×3

×3

Tips

  • Jellybeans are a good upgrade to common healing foods such as Pierogi or healing items such as the Bat Bat and Healing Salves, as each Bee Queen kill yields between 2160 and 3240 HP worth of jellybeans depending on if the crown is deconstructed or not.
  • Wormwood is capable of healing from Jellybeans, minus the first small initial health bonus.
    • The other food he's able to eat in order to regain health is the Grim Galette.
  • Jellybeans can be Seasoned by Warly, creating useful buff consumables that do not spoil.

Trivia

  • Jellybeans were added in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update.
  • Jellybeans are the only Crock Pot dish that yield in sets of more than one.
  • If a player consumes Jellybeans and drowns, despawns or dies the healing effect will remain after they spawn again.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

'''Jellybeans''' are a [[Crock Pot]] [[Food]] item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. They are produced by combining at least 1 [[Royal Jelly]] and 3 fillers, excluding [[Inedibles]] and [[Monster Food]]s (which will result in [[Taffy]]), and produce 3 Jellybeans.

Eating Jellybeans gives the character 2 {{hp}} and 5 {{Sanity}} upon consumption and then starts the regenerating effect of 2 {{hp}} every 2 seconds for 2 minutes, for a total of 122 Health. Eating multiple Jellybeans will not stack the healing effects.

[[Wigfrid]] is capable of eating Jellybeans, despite it not being meat.

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Royal Jelly
|item2 = Filler
|count2 = 3
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Jellybeans
|resultcount = 3
|note = Filler cannot be [[Inedibles]] or [[Monster Food]].
}}

=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Jellybeans are a good upgrade to common healing foods such as [[Pierogi]] or healing items such as the [[Bat Bat]] and [[Healing Salve]]s, as each Bee Queen kill yields between 2160 and 3240 HP worth of jellybeans depending on if the crown is [[Deconstruction Staff|deconstructed]] or not.
* [[Wormwood]] is capable of healing from Jellybeans, minus the first small initial health bonus.
**The other food he's able to eat in order to regain health is the [[Grim Galette]].
* Jellybeans can be [[Seasonings Tab|Seasoned]] by [[Warly]], creating useful buff consumables that do not spoil.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Jellybeans were added in the ''[[A New Reign#November 3, 2016 - Cute Fuzzy Animals|Cute Fuzzy Animals]]'' update.
*Jellybeans are the only Crock Pot dish that yield in sets of more than one.
*If a player consumes Jellybeans and drowns, despawns or dies the healing effect will remain after they spawn again.
